---
title: A Design for Living
subtitle: Imago, the Theatre Mask Ensemble
author: Jerry Mouawad
date: 10/01/2025
date-format: "MMMM YYYY"
image: living/cover_living.webp
lightbox: 
  match: auto
  effect: zoom
toc: false
page-layout: full
language: 
  title-block-author-single: "Director"
  title-block-published: "Date"
include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
        h1.title {
          text-align: center;
          padding: 10px
        }
        p.subtitle {
          text-align: center;
          padding: 10px
        }
        .quarto-title-meta-heading {
          display: none;
        }
        .quarto-title-meta-contents {
          display: none;
        }
        </style>
---

## Photos

| | | |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| ![](living/living_1.jpg){group="living" .lightbox} | ![](living/living_2.jpg){group="living" .lightbox} | ![](living/living_3.jpg){group="living" .lightbox} |
| ![](living/living_4.jpg){group="living" .lightbox} | ![](living/living_5.jpg){group="living" .lightbox} | ![](living/living_6.jpg){group="living" .lightbox} |
| ![](living/living_7.jpg){group="living" .lightbox} | ![](living/living_8.jpg){group="living" .lightbox} | ![](living/living_9.jpg){group="living" .lightbox} |
| ![](living/living_10.jpg){group="living" .lightbox} | ![](living/living_11.jpg){group="living" .lightbox} |

: {.custom-table}
